title: Tunisian-Style Ham Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic tagine dish made with roasted ham, parma ham, and a blend of spices, perfect for a gluten-free meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the diced roasted ham, Tunisian ham, and parma ham to the pot.
Add the cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the pot.
Stir to combine and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the pot to the oven and cook at 300°F for 20-25 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Serve over gluten-free couscous or rice, if desired.
